body:
## Problem

The ~40 pages at `/gear/<brand>/<series>/drummers-using` (e.g. `/gear/tama/iron-cobra/drummers-using`) are sitemapped via `GEAR_INDEX` (shipped in #871/#995-998) but `api/meta/[...path].js` has **no handler** for this 3-segment path pattern.

The current code at line 778 matches `/gear/<single-slug>` only; gear series paths have 3+ segments and fall through to the generic SPA fallback:
- Title: `MetalForge | Discover What Metal Drummers Play`
- Description: empty
- Schema: none

Same SSR bug class as #1266 (drummer category pages, shipped), #1301 (gear category pages, approved), #1265 (guides, shipped).

## Fix

**File:** `api/meta/[...path].js`

Add a new handler **before** the default fallback. Import `GEAR_INDEX` (already imported in `api/sitemap.js` — mirror that import):

```js
// /gear/<brand>/<series>/drummers-using
const gearSeriesDrummersMatch = path.match(/^\/gear\/([a-z0-9-]+)\/([a-z0-9-]+)\/drummers-using$/);
if (gearSeriesDrummersMatch) {
  const [, brand, series] = gearSeriesDrummersMatch;
  // look up from GEAR_INDEX for brand/series display names
  const entry = GEAR_INDEX.find(g => g.brandSlug === brand && g.seriesSlug === series);
  const brandName = entry ? entry.brand : brand;
  const seriesName = entry ? entry.series : series;
  return {
    title: `${brandName} ${seriesName} — Metal Drummers Who Use This Gear | ${SITE_NAME}`,
    description: `Discover which professional metal drummers use ${brandName} ${seriesName}. Complete list with gear setups and endorsements.`,
    image: DEFAULT_IMAGE,
    type: 'website',
    url: `${BASE_URL}/gear/${brand}/${series}/drummers-using`,
    articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
      '@type': 'CollectionPage',
      name: `Metal Drummers Who Use ${brandName} ${seriesName}`,
      description: `Professional metal drummers who use ${brandName} ${seriesName}`,
      url: `${BASE_URL}/gear/${brand}/${series}/drummers-using`,
      breadcrumb: {
        '@type': 'BreadcrumbList',
        itemListElement: [
          { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 1, name: 'Home', item: BASE_URL },
          { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 2, name: 'Gear', item: `${BASE_URL}/gear` },
          { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 3, name: brandName, item: `${BASE_URL}/gear/${brand}` },
          { '@type': 'ListItem', position: 4, name: `${brandName} ${seriesName} Drummers`, item: `${BASE_URL}/gear/${brand}/${series}/drummers-using` },
        ],
      },
    }),
  };
}
```

## Expected pages
~40 pages — all entries in `GEAR_INDEX` that have a `seriesSlug` (roughly 20-40 series across brands like Tama, Pearl, Meinl, Paiste, Zildjian).

## GSC query bucket served
- `[brand] [series] metal drummers`
- `what drummers use [brand] [series]`
- `[series] drum kit users`
Purchase-intent + comparison-intent long-tail. Directly compounds the brand content lane.

## Quality gate
- Title contains brand + series name
- Description is ≥120 chars
- CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD present in SSR response (`curl -s https://metalforge.io/gear/tama/iron-cobra/drummers-using | grep -c 'CollectionPage'` ≥ 1)

## Sequencing
- Independent of all other open issues
- Can ship in parallel with #1325 (lick hub schema)

## Verify
1. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/gear/tama/iron-cobra/drummers-using | grep '<title>'` returns Tama Iron Cobra title
2. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/gear/meinl/byzance/drummers-using | grep -c 'CollectionPage'` returns ≥1
3. Google Rich Results Test on any /gear/<brand>/<series>/drummers-using URL shows BreadcrumbList
4. No 500 errors on any gear series drummers-using page
5. All ~40 URLs return 200 with keyword-matched titles

## Done
- [ ] `api/meta/[...path].js` — new `gearSeriesDrummersMatch` handler added
- [ ] Verified: SSR title correct for ≥3 gear series pages
- [ ] Verified: CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD present in SSR HTML
title: SEO batch: /gear/<brand>/<series>/drummers-using pages missing SSR meta + CollectionPage schema (~40 pages)
